name: InterruptSetup
desc: Sets the InterruptCode pointer and calls MainGameLoop

name: MainGameLoop
desc: Code that runs every frame

name: InitGame
desc: Called when the game boots to setup RAM

name: SoftResetCheck
desc: Checks if the soft reset button combo is pressed

name: CallLz77UnComp16Bit
desc: Calls LZ77UnCompReadNormalWrite16bit

name: CallLz77UnComp8Bit
desc: Calls LZ77UnCompReadNormalWrite8bit

name: CallSoundBias
desc: Calls SoundBias0 and SoundBias0x200

name: UpdateInput
desc: Reads controller input from I/O RAM

name: ClearRAM
desc: Clears VRAM, OAM, and PALRAM

name: FixedPointMultiply
desc: Fixed-point multiplication of two values, where the second has a scaling factor of 1/256 (ranges from -128 to 127.99)

name: FixedPointDivide
desc: Fixed-point division of two values, where the second has a scaling factor of 1/4 (ranges from -8192 to 8191.75)

name: FixedPointInverse
desc: Fixed-point inverse of a value, with a scaling factor of 1/65536

name: EraseSram
desc: Fills SRAM with 0xFFFF

name: InitSound
desc: Initializes registers and RAM values that are related to sound/music (sets the pointers to the sound codes)

name: TransferSound
desc: Sets up 2 repeat DMA Transfers from the raw sound data to the FIFO channels

name: PlaySoundIfNotPlaying
desc: Plays a sound if it's not already playing

name: PlaySoundAfterCutscene
desc: Plays a sound that fades in (used to replay the elevator sound after a cutscene)

name: CheckSetNewMusicTrack
desc: Checks if the provided music track is different from the current one

name: UpdateMusicAfterAlarmStops
desc: Updates the current played music after the alarm stops in Chozodia

name: FadeOutMusic
desc: Fades the current music track

name: FadeOutMusicForDemo
desc: Fades the current music track (only used for demo)

name: FadeMusicAndQueueNext
desc: Fades the current music track and queues the provided track to play next

name: PlayMusicAndQueueCurr
desc: Queues the current music, plays the provided track, and replays the queued music when done

name: QueueSound
desc: Initializes a sound in the sound queue

name: FadeOrStopSound
desc: Fades or stops a sound depending on the provided timer

name: PlayMusicOrSoundWithDelay
desc: Adds a delay before the music/sound starts

name: CallSoundCodeB
desc: Switches to ARM mode and calls SoundCodeB

name: CallSoundCodeC
desc: Switches to ARM mode and calls SoundCodeC

name: CallSoundCodeA
desc: Switches to ARM mode and calls SoundCodeA

name: CallGetNoteFrenquency
desc: Switches to ARM mode and calls GetNoteFrequency

name: CpuFastSet
desc: Calls software interrupt 0xC

name: CpuSet
desc: Calls software interrupt 0xB

name: DivArm_Divide
desc: Calls software interrupt 0x7

name: DivArm_Modulo
desc: Calls software interrupt 0x7

name: Lz77UnCompReadNormalWrite16bit
desc: Calls software interrupt 0x12

name: Lz77UnCompReadNormalWrite8bit
desc: Calls software interrupt 0x11

name: MidiKey2Freq
desc: Calls software interrupt 0x1F

name: MultiBoot
desc: Calls software interrupt 0x25

name: SoundBias_0
desc: Calls software interrupt 0x19 (r0 = 0)

name: SoundBias_200
desc: Calls software interrupt 0x19 (r0 = 1)

name: Sqrt
desc: Calls software interrupt 0x8

name: VBlankIntrWait
desc: Calls software interrupt 0x5

name: SamusCheckScrewSpeedAffectingEnvironment
desc: Checks for screw attack/speedbooster damage to the environment

name: SamusCheckCollision
desc: Calls other functions related to checking for collision

name: SamusCheckSetEnvironmentEffect
desc: Checks if an environmental effect should spawn

name: SamusUpdateEnvironmentEffects
desc: Updates the environmental effects and checks if a liquid damage environment effect should happen

name: SamusUpdateJumpVelocity
desc: Updates the velocity of Samus mid-air (spin breaking, starting to spin, forced movements)

name: SamusTurnAroundArmCannon
desc: Checks if some fields should be carried from SamusDataCopy

name: SamusCopyData
desc: Copies SamusData into SamusDataCopy

name: SamusUpdatePhysics
desc: Sets SamusPhysics default values and check if slowed by liquid

name: SamusGetXVelocityOnSlope
desc: Checks if Samus is on a slope and changes the velocity accordingly

name: SamusUpdate
desc: Calls SamusUpdatePhysics, SamusExecutePoseRoutine, SamusUpdateVelocityPosition, sub_B8A8 and increments the animation counter

name: SamusUpdateGfx
desc: Calls UpdateSamusGraphics, SamusUpdateAnimAndTimers and SamusUpdateGroundEffects

params.name: Direction
params.desc: 0xA = right, 0xB = up, 0xC = left, 0x80 = Bomb above Samus flag

name: SamusFireBeamOrMissile
desc: Determines which new projectile Samus is firing

name: SamusCheckFirePistol
desc: Increments charge counter and checks if fully charged when B is released

return.name: NewProjectile
return.desc: New projectile (0 = none, 1 = pistol, 2 = charged pistol)

name: SamusSpawnNewProjectile
desc: Calls SamusFireBeamOrMissile or SamusCheckFirePistol

name: SamusCheckAButtonPressed
desc: If A is pressed, sets forced movement flag to 1, used in the standing pose subroutines (morphball, turning around, and standing)

name: SamusSetSelectedWeapon
desc: Sets what weapon is hightlighted in the HUD and arms the cannon if selecting missiles

name: SamusSetSpinningPose
desc: Sets the spinning pose (space jumping, spinning, screw attacking)

name: SamusCheckHazardDamage
desc: Checks for varia and gravity and inflicts hazard damage

name: SamusInactivity
desc: Default function used for pose subroutines that don't have any behavior (generally when the player isn't in control of Samus)

return.name: AnimState
return.desc: Animation state (0 = none, 1 = sub-animation ended, 2 = animation ended)

name: SamusExecutePoseSubroutine
desc: Uses bx r1 to execute the current pose subroutines, also calls SamusSpawnNewWeapon, SamusSetSelectedWeapon, SamusLiquidDamage, SamusCheckShinesparking, and SamusSetSpinningPose

name: SamusUpdateGraphicsRam
desc: Updates Samus graphics, echo, and OAM

params.name: FacingLeftOrRight
params.desc: 0 if facing right, 1 if facing left

params.name: Direction
params.desc: 0 if facing right, 1 if facing left

name: RecordDemo
desc: Handles the recording of a demo via input (debug feature)

name: UpdateSamusGfx
desc: Transfers Samus graphics and palettes to VRAM

name: InitAndLoadRoomData
desc: Loads room specific data and copies common graphics/palette; if entering a room, initializes Samus and sprite data

name: UpdateSprites
desc: Calls sprite AI, updates sprite info (animation counter, stun timer), updates sprite debris, does checks related to Samus on sprite, and updates the alarm timer

name: UpdateSpriteAnim
desc: Updates the animation duration counter and the current animation frame

name: DrawOnScreenSprites
desc: Loop that calls the DrawSprite function, actually draws sprites, updates sprite debris, and is affected by the DisableDrawingSprites flag

name: SpriteDrawAll_Upper
desc: Same as CallDrawSprite2

name: LoadSpriteDataForRoom
desc: Calls ClearSpriteData, LoadSpriteset, CheckReloadEscapeDigitsGraphics, LoadLocationText, LoadRoomSprites, and SpawnSpacePiratesWaiting

name: ClearSpriteData
desc: Sets Status and StandingOnSpriteFlag to 0 for all sprites, also clears all sprite debris

return.name: AssignedSpriteRamSlot
return.desc: Assigned sprite RAM slot (0xFF if not assigned)

return.name: AssignedSpriteRamSlot
return.desc: Assigned sprite RAM slot (0xFF if not assigned)

name: SpawnDropsAndFollowers
desc: Spawns a drop or follower according to the primary sprite

return.name: AssignedSpriteRamSlot
return.desc: Assigned sprite RAM slot (0xFF if not assigned)

name: TakeDamageFromSprite
desc: Handles Samus taking damage from a sprite

name: CheckObjectsTouching
desc: Checks if two objects are touching

name: SamusAndSpriteCollision
desc: Checks if Samus is colliding with a sprite, applies that collision

name: CheckCenterCollisionAtPosition_Slopes
desc: Accounts for slopes

name: SpriteFalling
desc: Seems unused

name: MechaRidleyMissileRotation
desc: Calculates the new OAM rotation for the current sprite to face Samus

return.name: Side
return.desc: Side (4 if left of sprite, 8 if right of sprite, 0 if out of range)

return.name: Side
return.desc: Side (1 if above sprite, 2 if below sprite, 0 if out of range)

return.name: Side
return.desc: Side (3 if in front, 0xC if behind, 0 if out of range)

name: SpriteUnfreezeAnim_EasyMode
desc: Unfreeze animation for Metroids on easy mode and for winged ripper on any difficulty

name: MetroidUnfreezeAnim
desc: Unfreeze animation for Metroids on normal and hard difficulty

return.name: SuperMissilesNotFullAtStart
return.desc: Super missiles not full at start

return.name: PowerBombsNotFullAtStart
return.desc: Power bombs not full at start

name: SpriteTakeDamageFromSamusContact
desc: Determines if a sprite should take damage when hitting Samus

return.name: DamageContactType
return.desc: Damage contact type (0 = none, 1 = shinespark, 2 = speedbooster, 3 = screw attack, 4 = pseudo screw)

name: FindPrimarySprite
desc: Finds the first primary sprite with the provided ID

return.name: SpriteRamSlot
return.desc: Sprite RAM slot (0xFF if not found)

return.name: SpriteRamSlot
return.desc: Sprite RAM slot (0xFF if not found)

name: RandomSpriteDebris
desc: Initialize 1 to 3 sprite debris choosen randomly among 2 options (only the debris type changes)

return.name: AmmoDropSpriteId
return.desc: Ammo drop sprite ID (0 if none)

return.name: EnemyDropSpriteId
return.desc: Enemy drop sprite ID (0 if none)

name: SpriteDeath
desc: Called when a sprite dies, spawns a drop, calls RandomSpriteDebris and SetParticleEffect

name: IsSpriteOnScreenAndShaking
desc: Checks if a sprite is on screen and a screen shake is active (used in sova, zoomer and zeela AI)

return.name: SpriteOnScreenAndScreenShakeIsActive
return.desc: Sprite on screen and screen shake is active

name: UpdateSubSpriteData1Timer
desc: Updates the sub-sprite data 1 + 0xE field, used by chozo statues for the echo when sitting

name: SpriteCheckOverlappingSamus
desc: Calls CheckObjectsTouching to detect overlap between the current sprite and Samus draw distance offsets

name: SetSpriteSplashEffect
desc: Handles the splashing effect when a sprite goes in/out of a liquid

name: GetNumOfItemsCollected
desc: Used by Mecha Ridley to double its health and damage if 100 items are collected

name: EnemyDropGet
desc: Samus and enemy drop collision handler

name: MorphBallGet
desc: Samus and morph ball collision handler

name: MorphBallFlashAnim
desc: Handles the morph ball flashing animation when Samus is grabbing it

name: ChargeBeamInitGfxAndCollision
desc: Initializes the charge beam to be visible

name: ChargeBeamGet
desc: Samus and charge beam collision handler

name: ChargeBeamFlashingAnim
desc: Handles the charge beam flashing animation when Samus is grabbing it

name: ChargeBeamGlowMovement
desc: Handles the charge beam glow movement based on the charge beam Y position

name: ChozoStatueSyncBodyPosition
desc: Syncs the Chozo statue body sprites position with the Chozo statue main sprite

return.name: ChozoStatueBehavior
return.desc: Chozo statue behavior (0 = item, 1 = refill, 2 = hint, 3 = hint taken)

name: ChozoStatueBodyHandRefillAnim
desc: Handles the glow animation on the Chozo statue hand

name: ChozoStatueBodyRefill
desc: Refills Samus's energy and weapons

name: ChozoStatueBody_Empty
desc: Empty function

name: ChozoStatuePartLegIdle
desc: Changes the current sprite pose depending on the main chozo statue pose (sitting related)

name: UnknownItemChozoStatueHintFlashing_Unused
desc: Same code as ChozoStatueHintFlashing, unused

name: UnknownItemChozoItemEndHint_Unused
desc: Same code as ChozoStatueEndHint, unused

name: UnknownItemChozoStatueHintSit_Unused
desc: Same code as ChozoStatueHintSit, unused

name: UnknownItemChozoStatueHintSitFinish_Unused
desc: Same code as ChozoStatueHintSitFinish, unused

name: UnknownItemChozoStatueBodyHandRefillAnim
desc: Handles the glow animation on the Chozo statue hand

name: UnknownItemChozoStatueBodyRefill
desc: Refills Samus's energy and weapons

name: UnknownItemChozoStatueBody_Empty
desc: Empty function

name: UnknownItemChozoStatueBodyInitHintGfx_Unused
desc: Same code as ChozoStatueBodyInitHintGfx, unused

name: ChozoStatueHintChangeClipAction
desc: Changes the current clipdata affecting action and calls ProcessClipdata

name: ChozoStatueSittingChangeClipAction
desc: Changes the current clipdata affecting action and calls ProcessClipdata

name: ChozoBall_Empty
desc: Empty function

name: ZoomerNormalDirectionGfxInit
desc: Used when a zoomer is falling

name: Zoomer_Unused
desc: Calls ZoomerNormalDirectionGfxInit and sets pose to 0xF, seems unused

name: ZeelaNormalDirectionGfxInit
desc: Used when a zeela is falling

name: Zeela_Unused
desc: Calls ZeelaNormalDirectionGfxInit and sets pose to F, seems unused

name: KraidMouthDetermineSpikePosition
desc: Syncs the sub-sprites with Kraid

name: KraidCheckProjectilesCollidingWithBelly
desc: Checks if any projectile is colliding with Kraid's belly, if so spawns a particle effect, 2 random sprite debris, starts a horizontal screen shake, and destroys the projectile

name: KraidRandomSpriteDebrisOnCeiling
desc: Used when Kraid appears/dies

name: KraidMoveBg2ToLeft
desc: Adds r0 to the BG2 horizontal movement global variable and reduces MultiSpritesXPosition with r0

name: KraidPreventSamusGoingThrough
desc: Prevents Samus from going through Kraid during the death animation

name: KraidDeath
desc: Sets the Kraid killed event and updates the minimap

name: ItemBannerStatic
desc: Handles the part when the item banner is static (checks for input)

name: ItemBannerRemovalAnim
desc: Spawns a falling Chozo pillar sprite if the item banner is for the fully powered suit

name: ReoRng
desc: Writes 2 values to sprite data based on the sprite random number

name: ZiplineCheckColliding
desc: Checks if the zipline is hitting a solid block on either side

name: UnusedMultiviola_Empty1
desc: Empty function (likely related to the unused multiviola sprite)

name: UnusedMultiviola_Empty2
desc: Empty function (likely related to the unused multiviola sprite)

name: MapStationSpawnMessage
desc: Determines what message banner should be spawned depending on the current area

name: SavePlatformTextTimer
desc: Timer before displaying the "Save complete" banner

name: SavePlatformTop_Empty
desc: Empty function

name: DeoremLeftChangeClipAction
desc: Used to place solid clipdata on the left side of Deorem and remove the solid clipdata when he dies

name: DeoremRightChangeClipAction
desc: Used to place solid clipdata on the right side of Deorem and remove the solid clipdata when he dies

name: DeoremSetEyeOpeningTimer
desc: Timer duration depends on the difficulty

name: DeoremSpawnGoingDown
desc: Spawns if Samus is nearby and has missiles, spawns the first half of the body (6 segments) and locks the screen

name: DeoremSpawnGoingUp
desc: Spawns 6 other Deorem segments

name: DeoremSpawnHeadBody
desc: Spawns the hidden part of the body (above the head) and the eye sprite

name: DeoremAfterThorns
desc: Called after the last thorn is thrown and before it hits the ground

name: DeoremDying
desc: Sets events according to first or second location

name: DeoremLeaving
desc: Spawns 3 new Deorem segments and clears/sets events

name: HivePhase1
desc: Spawns a mellow if necesserary and checks if the hive should go to phase 2

name: HivePhase2
desc: Spawns a mellow if necesserary and checks if the hive should go to phase 3

name: HivePhase3
desc: Spawns a mellow if necessary

name: MorphBallLauncherBombTimer
desc: Timer that's as long as the bomb explosion time

name: ImagoCocoonChangeOneClipAction
desc: Removes the middle block of the floor when imago cocoon falls

name: ImagoCocoonChangeTwoMiddleClipAction
desc: Removes the 2 blocks of the floor around the middle block when imago cocoon falls

name: ImagoCocoonChangeTwoAroundClipAction
desc: Removes the 2 blocks at the edges of the floor when imago cocoon falls

name: ImagoCocoonChangeTwoBlockingClipAction
desc: Removes the blocks blocking the passage after imago dies

name: WingedRipperImagoCollision
desc: Used when Imago is falling

name: DisableChozodiaAlarm
desc: Disables the alarm if Mecha Ridley isn't dead, sets the stealth music if fully powered suit isn't obtained

name: SpacePirateCheckCollidingWithLaser
desc: Checks if a space pirate is colliding with a space pirate laser

name: SpacePirateFireLaserGround
desc: Spawns space pirate lasers secondary sprites when the space pirate fires on ground

name: SpacePirateDeath
desc: Disables the alarm if no other space pirates are alive

name: BlackSpacePirateHitByProjectile
desc: Deals damage if the projectile is plasma

name: ZiplineGeneratorActivating
desc: Sets the ziplines activated event

name: SecurityGateChangeClipAction
desc: Enables/disables the hitbox for the gate

name: SecurityGateDefaultOpenCheckAlarm
desc: Checks to close the gate if the alarm is active

name: SecurityGateDefaultOpenOpenAfterAlarm
desc: Checks to open the gate if the alarm has ended

name: SecurityGateDeath
desc: Seems unused

name: SecurityGateDefaultClosedCheckAlarm
desc: Checks to open the gate if the alarm is active

name: SecurityGateDefaultClosedCloseAfterAlarm
desc: Checks to close the gate if the alarm has ended

name: SecurityGate_Open_Ai
desc: Security gate that starts open by default

name: SecurityGate_Closed_Ai
desc: Security gate that starts closed by default

name: ParasiteCountOnSamus
desc: Counts the number of parasites on Samus, used to check if Samus should take damage

name: Parasite_Multiple_Tumbling
desc: Used when a parasite is hit with a beam or knocked off of Samus or a geron

name: ParasiteTumbling
desc: Used when a parasite is hit with a beam or knocked off of Samus or a geron

name: ParasiteCheckEvent
desc: Checks if the parasites killed event should be set

name: PistonChangeFourClipAction
desc: Enables the hitbox for the piston

name: PistonChangeOneBelowClipAction
desc: Enables/disables the hitbox of the bottom block of the piston

name: PistonChangeOneUpperClipAction
desc: Enables the hitbox of the top block of the piston

name: PistonCheckSamusIn
desc: Checks if Samus is in the top part of the piston after it went up

name: RidleyPlayCutscene
desc: Checks for Samus to turn left

name: Ridley_Empty
desc: Empty function

name: RidleyDying
desc: Sets the Ridley killed event

name: RidleyFireBallSmallMove
desc: Used when Samus is grabbed

name: RidleyFireBallBigMove
desc: Used when Samus is grabbed

name: RidleyFireBallMediumMove
desc: Used at the beginning of the fight

name: MetroidCheckSamusGrabbed
desc: Checks if Samus is already grabbed by another Metroid

name: MetroidDeath
desc: Checks if all Metroids are dead, sets event if so

name: SecurityLaser_Unused
desc: Similar code to SecurityLaserCheckDespawnAnimEnded, seems unused

name: RuinsTestChangeClipAction
desc: Disables the ceiling hitbox

name: RuinsTestMoveToPosition
desc: Used to move the symbols to the corners and to move the ghost back to the center at the end of the fight

name: RuinsTestGhostMove
desc: Moves the ghost using the SineYValues table

name: RuinsTestReflectionEnd
desc: Plays the fully powered suit cutscene, sets the fully powered suit event, and opens the ceiling

name: MotherBrainPaletteSwitching
desc: Used when Mother Brain charges the beam and fires it

name: MotherBrainEye_Empty
desc: Empty function

name: AcidWormChangeTwoGroundClipAction
desc: Used to remove the 2 blocks on the ground

name: AcidWormChangeBigBlockBottomClipAction
desc: Used to remove the 2 bottom blocks of the big block on the ground

name: AcidWormChangeBigBlockMiddleClipAction
desc: Used to remove the 2 middle blocks of the big block on the ground

name: AcidWormChangeBigBlockTopClipAction
desc: Used to remove the 2 top blocks of the big block on the ground

name: CannonCheckSurroundings
desc: Checks for walls to know where the cannon can turn

name: Geruta_TangleVine_Ai
desc: Geurta (tangle vine) AI

name: ImagoSetEvent
desc: Sets the imago killed event

name: Crocomire_Empty
desc: Empty function

name: GunshipEscapeZebes
desc: Sets the escaped zebes event

name: GlassTubeChangeClipAction
desc: Disables the glass tube hitbox

name: SavePlatformTopChozodia_Empty
desc: Empty function

name: ElevatorStatueChangeTwoGroundClipAction
desc: Enables the hitbox of the statue debris on the ground

name: KraidElevatorStatueChangeClipAction
desc: Enables/disables the hitbox of the statue

name: RidleyElevatorStatueChangeClipAction
desc: Enables/disables the hitbox of the statue

name: StatueVerticalLineChangeClipAction
desc: Enables/disables the hitbox of a vertical line of 6 blocks

name: StatueHorizontalLineThreeChangeClipAction
desc: Enables/disables the hitbox of a horizontal line of 3 blocks

name: StatueHorizontalLineEightChangeClipAction
desc: Enable/disable the hitbox of a horizontal line of 8 blocks

name: RidleyStatueChangeThreeClipAction
desc: Enables the hitbox for a horizontal line of 3 blocks

name: RidleyStatueChangeFourClipAction
desc: Enables/disables the hitbox for 4 blocks

name: UnknownItemBlockChangeClipAction
desc: Enables/disables the hitbox for the block

name: EscapeShipSetIgnoreSamus
desc: Loops through all sprites and sets IgnoreSamusCollision timer to 0xF

name: MechaRidleyCheckSamusOutOfAmmo
desc: Checks if Samus is out out missiles and super missiles, used to force a missile attack

name: EscapeGateChangeClipAction
desc: Enables/disables the hitbox for the gate

name: SetBeamParticleEffect
desc: Sets a particle effect at the arm cannon depending on the direction

name: CallDrawProjectile_OverSprites
desc: Loops through all projectiles and calls DrawProjectile if the UnderSprites status flag isn't set

name: CallDrawProjectile_UnderSprites
desc: Loops through all projectiles and calls DrawProjectile if the UnderSprites status flag is set

name: CheckDespawnProjectile
desc: Checks if a projectile is too far offscreen

name: LoadBeamGfxAndClearProjectiles
desc: Calls LoadBeamGraphics and clears all projectiles if the pause screen flag is 0

name: ProjectileCheckHittingSolid
desc: Checks if a projectile is hitting solid clipdata

return.name: SpriteFreezeTimer
return.desc: Sprite freeze timer (0xF0 if alive, 0 if dead)

name: ChargedBeamHitSprite
desc: Handles a charged beam (without ice) hitting a sprite

name: IceBeamHitSprite
desc: Handles an ice beam (not charged) hitting a sprite

name: StartMissileTumble_CurrSprite
desc: Used by Kraid's head

name: DrawHudEnergyTanks
desc: Updates the energy tank squares on the HUD

params.name: FileNum
params.desc: 0 = in-game, 1 = file A, 2 = file B, 3 = file C

name: CheckTimerDisplayed
desc: Checks which escape timer should be activated

return.name: TimerType
return.desc: Timer type (1 for Mother Brain, 2 for Mecha Ridley, 0 otherwise)

name: CheckTimerShouldStop
desc: Checks if Samus has finished the escape

name: SetTimerDigits
desc: Sets the timer depending on the escape and the difficulty

name: UpdateVerticalScreenShake
desc: Updates the vertical screen shake and returns the Y position offset for the backgrounds

name: UpdateHorizontalScreenShake
desc: Updates the horizontal screen shake and returns the X position offset for the backgrounds

name: GetBgSizeFlag
desc: Returns the corresponding size flag for the BGCNT registers

return.name: IsDark
return.desc: Is dark (0xFFFF if room is dark, 0 otherwise)

name: SetAutomaticBgMovement
desc: Sets the BG0 and BG3 scrolling depending on the room effect/background 3 scrolling method

name: UpdateHatchFlashingAnimation
desc: Handles the flashing animation of hatches when unlocked

name: CopyClipdataHandlingCode
desc: Copied to non-gameplay RAM

name: CheckGroundTypeUnderSamus
desc: Checks for a ground effect clipdata

name: UpdateCurrScrolls
desc: Updates the 2 current scrolls, also checks for extended bounds (when taking an elevator and when triggered by a breakable block)

name: DefaultScroll
desc: Handles the automatic scrolling on a room with no scrolls

name: DefaultScrollY
desc: Handles the automatic Y scrolling on a room with no scrolls

name: DefaultScrollX
desc: Handles the automatic X scrolling on a room with no scrolls

name: HandleMovingBg0
desc: Handles the automatic scrolling of BG0

name: GetBg3ScrollingValues
desc: Gets the X/Y scrolling values of BG3 depending on the current room entry BG3 scrolling

name: HandleMovingBg3
desc: Handles the automatic scrolling of BG3

name: FreeMovementDebugCameraLock
desc: Slow scrolling, BG1 related

name: ShiftNeverReformBlocks
desc: Shifts the never reform blocks when transitioning, adds room ID to the data

return.name: BlockChanged
return.desc: Block changed (Returns 1 if block was destroyed, made solid, or hatch opened)

name: UpdateMakeSolidBlock
desc: Updates the MakeSolidBlocks array

name: SamusApplyScrewSpeedDamageToEnvironment
desc: Return value is not initialized, can be garbage in false case

params.name: DestructingAction
params.desc: 0 = none, 1 = speed booster, 2 = screw attack, 3 = both

name: StoreBrokenReformBlock
desc: Stores a new broken reform block in RAM

name: StoreBrokenNonReformBlock
desc: Stores a broken non-reform block in RAM

name: SetRawBg1BlockValue
desc: Does not update tilemap or VRAM

name: CheckSamusTouchingCodeTriggeringClipdata
desc: Calls CheckTouchingTransitionOrTank, checks for transparency changes, calls CheckWalkingOnCrumbleBlock and CheckGrabbingCrumbleBlock

name: CheckSamusOnCrumbleBlock
desc: Checks both fast and slow crumble blocks

return.name: DoorBehavior
return.desc: Door behavior (0 = not opening, 1 = opening, 2 = locked)

name: RemoveCollectedTanks
desc: Removes the collected tanks when loading a room

name: CallMotherBrainUpdateGlass
desc: Calls MotherBrainUpdateGlass with good parameters

name: ApplyMonochromeToPalette
desc: Applies a monochrome effect to a palette and adds r2 to the color result

name: ApplySmoothMonochromeToPalette
desc: Applies a smooth monochrome transition effect between the provided palettes; stage goes from 0-20

params.name: SourceAddr_Normal
params.desc: Needs to be the result of ApplyMonochromeToPalette to work properly

name: ApplySpecialBgEffectColorOnBg
desc: Color is only applied if the color bit of mask isn't 0; mask is 0x7FFF (white) for every effect

name: ApplySpecialBgEffectColorOnObj
desc: Not applied to Samus; color is only applied if the color bit of mask isn't 0

name: HideScreenDuringLoad
desc: If removed, briely shows garbage tiles when loading the game

name: Bg3OFSRelated
desc: Changes BGPositionWrittenToBG3OFS

return.name: PBEndedAndRoomHasHaze
return.desc: Power bomb ended and room has haze

name: TransferAnimatedGraphics
desc: Transfers the animated graphics from WRAM to VRAM

name: OverrideOpenedHatch
desc: Sets missile, super missile, power bomb hatches to normal hatches if already opened

return.name: TargetDoorNum
return.desc: Target door number (0xFF if not found)

params.name: Action
params.desc: 0 for checking if opened, 1 for setting source and destination, 2 for setting source

name: HatchStartLockAnimation
desc: Locks a hatch visually

name: IntroSamusCloseUp
desc: Handles the Samus close up at the beginning of the game

name: UpgradeSuitCutscene
desc: Handles both varia and full suit

params.name: FlashType
params.desc: 0 = slight yellow flash, 1 = transparency change for statue long, 2 = heavy yellow flash 3 = quick flash

name: EventFunctions
desc: Used to clear, set, toggle, or check events

params.name: Action
params.desc: 0 if clearing event, 1 if setting event, 2 if toggling event, 3 if checking event

name: EndDemo
desc: Checks if another demo should start, also saves the recorded demo to SRAM if in debug mode

name: ReturnOne_Cutscene
desc: Returns 1 (used for cutscenes)

name: EndCutscene
